ItacAcademyItem.Name: Discordanti (Accademia dei) (Venezia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to the history of this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Festosi applausi di gloria all`Ill.mo Girolamo Bondumier... (Venezia, Bortoli, s.a.); Ad illustriss. et excell. d. equitem Andream Contarenum divi Marci procuratorem poeticae amoenitatis selecti flore … (Venezia, Bortoli, 1655); Clavestain, Ferdinand, Apologia in difesa d`una dottrina dell`eccellentissimo signor dottor Pietro Conti ... Raccolta, e data in luce da Ferdinando Clavestain salisburgese (In Francofurt, 1656?)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
